thought.text: 我将检查非满分样例的具体节点差异。

action.command: for d in functional-3/051_logi_assign.sysu.c functional-3/050_unary_op2.sysu.c functional-3/052_stmt_expr.sysu.c functional-3/063_nested_calls2.sysu.c mini-performance/dead-code-elimination.sysu.c; do echo ===$d score===; grep -E '生成树节点总数|level1|level2|得分|本节点情况 level [12]|标准答案节点|用户答案节点|kind:|opcode:|value:|qualType' /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task2/$d/score.txt | sed -n '1,220p'; done
